original: You adjust the selector to freckles and press the medipen to the center of your forehead. There’s a quiet hiss from the device followed by a tingling sensation that spreads from the injection site to the rest of your face. When the tingling finally ends you pull out your codex and use it to check your reflection, finding
that you can’t tell the difference through your [pc.skinFurScales], but you’re sure
You adjust the selector to freckles and press the medipen to the center of your forehead. There’s a quiet hiss from the device
, but you don’t feel anything happen. You pull out your codex to check your face but are disappointed to find nothing has changed. It looks like freckles won’t show up on a furred face.

followed by a tingling sensation that spreads from the injection site to the rest of your face. When the tingling finally ends you pull out your codex and use it to check your reflection, finding that you now have freckles!
You adjust the selector to freckled and press the medipen to your sternum. There’s a quiet hiss from the device
followed by a tingling sensation that spreads from the injection site over your whole body. When the tingling finally ends you pull out your codex and use it to check your reflection, finding
that you can’t tell the difference through your [pc.skinFurScales], but you’re sure
, but you don’t feel anything happen. You pull out your codex to check your skin but are disappointed to find nothing has changed. It looks like freckles won’t show up on a furred body.
followed by a tingling sensation that spreads from the injection site over your whole body. Freckles are appearing all over you from the neck down. Your body is now freckled.
You put the injector back into your inventory.
You adjust the selector to "+o+" and press the injector just below your sternum. There’s a quiet hiss from the device,
but nothing else seems to happen. It seems changing your skin color doesn’t do much when its covered by fur or scales.

followed by a tingling sensation that spreads from the injection site over your whole body. "+h.m.upperCase(o)+" is spreading outwards from your sternum, replacing your previous skin color. You now have [pc.skinTone] [pc.skinNoun].
nothing. Waiting for another minute with nothing happening, leads you to a single conclusion: Something must be preventing you from changing your [pc.skinTone] [pc.skinNoun].

You adjust the selector to "+window.getAccentMarking(a)+" and press the medipen to your sternum. There’s a quiet hiss from the device, followed by a tingling sensation that spreads from the injection site over your whole body. "+h.m.capitalize(window.getAccentMarking(a))+([3,6].includes(a)?" patterns":"")+" of "+o+" are appearing all over you from the neck down. Your body is now "+window.getAccentMarking(a,!1)+".

You adjust the selector to recolor your body markings to "+o+" and press the medipen to your sternum. There’s a quiet hiss from the device, followed by a tingling sensation that spreads from the injection site over your whole body. When the tingling finally ends you pull out your codex to check your reflection, finding that the [pc.skinAccent] of your [pc.accentMarkingsNoun] has changed to "+o+".

You adjust the selector to remove your body markings and press the medipen to your sternum. There’s a quiet hiss from the device, followed by a tingling sensation that spreads from the injection site over your whole body. When the tingling finally ends you pull out your codex to check your reflection, finding that your body no longer has [pc.accentMarkings].
